title: ToolTips Stylized
description: This resource pack adds badges/icons and colors to item tooltips.
body:
# ToolTips Stylized
**This resource pack adds badges/icons and colors to item tooltips.**

[![IMG Badge - Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/-WIKI-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook&logoColor=white)](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/projects/ressource-packs/tooltips-stylized)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-CURSEFORGE-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=e58e0e&logoColor=e58e0e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tooltips-stylized)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-MODRINTH-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=17b95a&logoColor=17b95a)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltips-stylized)
[![IMG Badge - Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SUPPORT-6d30fd?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/gabrieldja)
[![IMG Badge - GD Team](https://img.shields.io/badge/MY_WEBSITE-245cf3?style=for-the-badge)](https://gabrieldjalayer.wixsite.com/gabrieldja-gaming-yt)

### 📜 License
This pack was created by **GabrielDja**.  
📑 **[Read the terms of use](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/guides/licenses#tooltips-stylized)**

### ℹ️ Optifine is not required
#### Available in the following languages:
- English (US)
- Français (FR)

### 🔥 Features
- Item icons
- Badge icons
- Additional info including nutrition, light level and more...
- Tooltip background texture (for 1.21.2+)
- This pack has been adapted for scale 2 interface settings (may support scale 1 and 3 in the future).

### ⭐ Best Experience
[![Best Experience with this Pack!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/31958c_923720d30a924f2bb797da965271b01c~mv2.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-simplestylized)
